text.title: Nginx Production LB Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the lb-nginx-production methodology end-to-end.

step.name: tune-workers
step.input: Host CPU count + RAM + expected concurrent connections.
step.action: Set `worker_processes auto;`, `worker_rlimit_nofile 65535;`, `events { worker_connections 8192; multi_accept on; use epoll; }`.

step.name: define-upstreams
step.action: For each upstream: declare with `zone <name> 64k;` + `keepalive 32;` + `least_conn;` (or default RR). List backends with `max_fails=3 fail_timeout=30s` passive health.

step.name: write-server-tls
step.input: Cert + key path, TLS profile, host names.
step.action: Write `server { listen 443 ssl http2; ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3; ssl_ciphers '...'; ssl_stapling on; ssl_stapling_verify on; ssl_session_cache shared:SSL:10m; }`. Add 80-listener returning 301 to https.

step.name: add-limit-and-headers
step.action: In `http`: declare `limit_req_zone` + `limit_conn_zone`. In `server`: apply `limit_req zone=req_per_ip burst=20 nodelay;` and the five security headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy). Set `add_header` with `always` to apply on error responses too.

step.name: validate-and-reload
step.action: Run `nginx -t`. Run `validate-lb-nginx-production.py --file artefact.json`. Reload with `nginx -s reload`. Smoke-test with `curl -I https://host/`; confirm TLS 1.2+ via `nmap --script ssl-enum-ciphers` and the five headers via the curl output.
step.output: Live LB serving traffic with rate-limit + headers + TLS hardened.
step.decision-gate: If `nginx -t` fails, fix syntax before reload.
